---
name: Contributor access request
about: Request write (collaborator) access to contribute regularly
title: 'Contributor access request: <your GitHub username>'
labels: ['contributor-access']
assignees: aoneahsan
---

<!--
You do NOT need write access to contribute — anyone can fork this repo and open a pull request.
Request access only if you plan to contribute regularly and would rather work in branches inside
this repository than maintain a fork.

IMPORTANT: write access does NOT let you push to `main`. The `main` branch is protected — every
change still needs a pull request with maintainer approval and green CI. Write access only lets you
push feature branches to this repository.
-->

## Who you are

- GitHub: @
- Name / contact (optional):

## What you'd like to work on

<!-- A feature, a fix, an area of the codebase. Link a related issue if there is one. -->

## Prior open-source work (optional, but it helps)

<!-- Links to past pull requests / repositories. -->

## Acknowledgement

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and understand that `main` is protected:
      changes require a pull request with maintainer approval, and write access cannot bypass review.
